analysis.consistency: High. The spell adheres well to the established pattern for high-level revival magic, particularly its focus on extreme cost and powerful, comprehensive restoration.
analysis.quality: Excellent. The description is evocative and clearly outlines the powerful effects, limitations (200 years, no death by old age, soul must be free and willing), and material components.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (A very high cost of 25,000 gp in diamonds, which are consumed, indicating a massive expenditure of energy/material to overcome true death.)
mechanics.core_effect: Restores a creature to life, healing all damage, removing negative conditions (poison, disease, curses), and reconstructing or replacing the body if necessary.
limitations: Creature must be dead for no longer than 200 years.
Cannot raise creatures that died of old age.
The soul must be free and willing.
mechanics.class_fit: Appropriate for Cleric (divine power over life/death) and Druid (deep connection to the cycle of life).

analysis.notes: This is the pinnacle of resurrection magic. The 200-year limit is notably longer than standard resurrection spells, reflecting its 9th-level power. The consumption of 25,000 gp in diamonds is a significant mechanical gatekeeping factor.
